Hannigan's Wake: Jessica is asked to re-open a 16-year-old murder investigation by a dying author who fears that the wrong man was convicted of the crime.
The Family Jewels: Jessica is embroiled in a murder investigation after a chauffeur is killed during a fundraiser. Will an extramarital affair lead Jessica to the murderer?
Tone Death: The team enters the unexpectedly dangerous world of competitive acapella when the body of an ex-con turned singer is discovered in the same theatre as Martha's latest show.
Memory Kings: Carrie investigates the murder of a prominent scientist who helped her to understand hyperthymesia.
Who's Bugging Mary?: Brandi is charged with murder and drug trafficking by Agt. O'Connor, leaving Mary to try to uncover the reasons behind his vendetta against her sister.

programmes.show_name: Murder, She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programmes.show_description: Whodunnit with Alison Sweeney. Expert baker and amateur sleuth Hannah Swensen has a puzzling new mystery to sink her teeth into when she finds an expired Sheriff on the streets of Eden Lake... (2016)
First Do No Harm: Dr Sloan's career is jeopardised when he battles against the health authorities after a four-year-old girl dies in his care.
Promises to Keep: Dr Sloan is determined to prove a colleague's innocence when a trusted security guard is suspected of trying to scam Community General out of a large sum of money.
A Body To Die For: Can Jessica unearth whether a local fitness instructor is responsible for the murder of a visiting con artist?
The Return Of Preston Giles: Jessica is asked to come to the rescue of her former publisher Preston Giles, after he is accused of murder.
Political Agenda: Sue tries to prove that a man with mental health issues is innocent of the murder of an investigative reporter.
Witness For The Prosecution: Castle takes to the stand to testify as the key witness in a murder case. But when new evidence is suddenly revealed, Castle questions his judgement.
Past Tense: The murder of a cab driver exposes a possible risk to national security when it is revealed that the victim may have been a government informant.
Miles to Go: Mary searches for the missing son of a witness who won't testify unless he's able to visit his child. Some disturbing information about the father and son is revealed.
...Cobbler Mystery: A rival bakery has opened, and its owners seem as sweet as pie. But when one of them is murdered, can Hannah cobble together the clues to find a killer? (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
